summary: Writer handoff is valid JSON, routes to qa_reviewer, and the branch diff is confined to allowed process/message/task paths. However, the evidence does not satisfy the M7 acceptance criteria for Beta-scale performance, memory, and loading validation: it reuses the SIM-005 30-node M1 perf baseline, records no memory/RSS/heap metric, records no explicit thresholds or accepted budgets, and does not provide low-end Windows assumptions or a reproducible Web/map/UI loading-density measurement beyond the generic Chromium E2E pass.

tests_run.result: Only project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/thread-registry.json, project/tasks/active/M7-PERFORMANCE-MEMORY-LOADING-001.json, and M7 performance outbox/route messages changed.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for the evidence report and task file
tests_run.result: Task/evidence IDs match; task status REVIEW; evidence has 12 artifact hashes; performance_baseline PASS; desktop_security_check PASS.
Current branch HEAD is d30095d26ec0f26fad82bd4374525e30d03f970d, a process-only QA route commit after writer handoff commit 4fcb62244ba90859196cff4086460724213dfa81.

tests_run.command: node -e artifact hash verification from evidence report
tests_run.result: All 12 evidence artifact hashes matched the local output files.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD -- apps packages tests content-source tools .github docs PROJECT_STATUS.md MANIFEST.md SHA256SUMS.txt VALIDATION_REPORT.md
tests_run.result: No output; no product code, test code, content, tools, CI, docs, gate/status, manifest, checksum, or validation report drift.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD -- packages/sim-core packages/sim-ai packages/save-format packages/client-core packages/map-renderer packages/ui apps/web apps/desktop apps/sim-runner tests .storybook
tests_run.result: No output; sim-core and client/platform package boundaries were not changed in this branch.

tests_run.command: git grep -n -E "signed|release readiness|release-ready|Steam|store|commercial|telemetry|analytics|server|multiplayer|cloud-save implementation|cloud save implementation|arbitrary-code|manual node battle" -- M7 performance evidence/task/process files
tests_run.result: Matches are task non-goals/Human Gate guardrails and historical state text only; no signed release readiness, telemetry, server/multiplayer, cloud-save implementation, arbitrary-code mod, manual node battle, or commercial commitment was introduced.

tests_run.command: Read packages/sim-core/scripts/performance-baseline.mjs and compare M5 performance gate handoffs
tests_run.result: The current M7 evidence uses the SIM-005 m1.abstract-graph-30 3650-day baseline. The M5 accepted gate included additional live Web responsiveness, RSS memory, multi-year run, save/load, and import/export timing probes that are absent from the M7 evidence.

decisions: REQUEST_CHANGES route_to=test_engineer; do not advance to lead integration yet.

The initial pnpm desktop:security-check ENOTEMPTY is sufficiently reported as a concurrent output-tree collision with pnpm desktop:package, and the serial rerun passing is acceptable evidence for that command.

No forbidden path, production dependency, telemetry, server/multiplayer, cloud-save implementation, arbitrary-code mod, manual node battle, release/commercial/branding decision, or frozen decision change was found.

sim-core determinism/boundary risk was not worsened by the diff because no product package changed; writer-reported pnpm check/test/sim:determinism remain useful supporting evidence, but they cannot replace missing M7 performance/memory/loading measurements.
risks: Accepting the current evidence would incorrectly treat an M1 30-node fixture baseline as M7 Beta-scale performance proof.
No memory/RSS/heap measurement is recorded, so the memory portion of M7-PERFORMANCE-MEMORY-LOADING-001 is unverified.
No explicit thresholds, budgets, PASS_WITH_LIMITS rationale, or low-end Windows assumption is recorded, so the PASS labels in the evidence are not auditable against the task criteria.

Map/UI density and Web startup/loading are only indirectly covered by a generic 21-test Chromium E2E pass and build success; there is no reproducible measured loading/density result in the evidence report.
requested_action: Add a corrected R2 evidence report/handoff that covers M7 Beta-scale performance, memory/RSS or heap, explicit thresholds or PASS_WITH_LIMITS budgets, low-end Windows assumptions, Web startup/loading, map/UI density, save/load timing, desktop smoke/package evidence, and artifact hashes. Keep the ENOTEMPTY concurrent-output-tree note and serial security-check rerun result. If Beta-scale or low-end validation cannot be run in this environment, mark the task PARTIAL/BLOCKED and route the exact limitation rather than claiming ACCEPT-ready evidence.
